title: gnaphalium serotinum
intro: Gnaphalium serotinum, also known as late ragwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to eastern North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gnaphalium serotinum include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications such as poultices and salves.
